name: /audit-pack: bundles the risk classification section sourced from compliance/risk-classification.yaml
command:
mkdir -p compliance && printf 'use_case: credit-scoring
classification: high
source_framework: eu-ai-act
obligations:
  - human-oversight
  - data-quality
' > compliance/risk-classification.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --risk-file "$PWD/compliance/risk-classification.yaml" --emit "$PWD/audit-pack.md" --section risk-classification && grep "credit-scoring" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && grep "high" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
